page: Microsoft Azure DC96as_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCasv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 96 dedicated vCPUs and is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include local storage, requiring the attachment of external storage solutions, though it is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs or hardware accelerators present on this instance. Additionally, the configuration does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC96as_v6 offers high resource density for workloads requiring substantial CPU cores and balanced memory without the overhead of local NVMe drives or specialized GPU hardware. This makes the instance appropriate for large-scale general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads utilizing external storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC96as_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine from the DCasv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and 384.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. This instance does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable, meaning storage must be provisioned externally. It also lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Qualitatively, the server provides high compute density for workloads that do not require local disk storage or hardware acceleration. The DC96as_v6 is designed for general-purpose enterprise applications, multi-threaded processing, and database deployments relying on network-attached storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC96as_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.
